pre_registration.success_criterion: 10% relative error, best method per exponent
pre_registration.mc_protocol: Metropolis + Wolff cluster for BOTH Ising and XY
pre_registration.commitment: NO parameter tuning after seeing results

hybrid.description: Metro for Binder (z=2.0), Wolff for χ/FSS (z=0.25)

self_diagnosis_pre_repair.overall_verdict: UNHEALTHY — significant issues detected; some outputs unreliable

findings.detail: beta CI inflated 27× by Tc — sampling CI is deceptive
gamma CI inflated 2× — Tc not dominant here
M: measured SNR≈31, synthetic calibration suggests ~19.2% fitting error at this SNR
chi: measured SNR≈2, synthetic calibration suggests ~19.2% fitting error at this SNR

recommendations: PRIORITY: Extend to L≥24 or add histogram reweighting to reduce Tc error
beta: DO NOT report sampling-only CI without Tc propagation

log: Self-diagnosis detected SEVERE Tc inflation → triggering self-repair
Running single-histogram reweighting on existing MC data...
Re-running dual CIs with refined Tc...
beta_repaired: sampling w=0.0244, full w=0.4086, ratio=16.7×
gamma_repaired: sampling w=0.4476, full w=0.7397, ratio=1.7×

tc_robustness.conclusion: Tc-dominance conclusion is robust to distributional choice (CI width varies by 26.0%)

pedestal_analysis.explanation: O(2) Goldstone modes create a magnetization pedestal M ~ 1/sqrt(N) = L^(-1.5) even above Tc. The true order parameter signal scales as L^(-0.519). The signal-to-pedestal ratio grows as L^0.981, so large L is required to separate them.
